caption: A hand holds a basketball trading card featuring player Chris Mullin in a protective plastic sleeve. The card displays a player photo, a signature, and the text "AWARD-WINNING" at the top and "CHRIS MULLIN" and "GOLDEN STATE WARRIORS" at the bottom. In the background, a man wearing a black hooded sweatshirt sits at a table with equipment and other card supplies. The background includes a red and white logo that reads "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS.COM". Across the frames, the hand slightly shifts its grip on the card, and the man in the background remains largely stationary, looking toward the camera. The overall setting appears to be a dedicated space for sports card breaking, with a branded backdrop and tools of the trade visible behind the main subject.
